sections.biography-source-undefined: Wenren Xi, styled Dingqing, was from Pei commandery. He first served as Minister Coachman before he was appointed as Grand Commandant. He later resigned, but was made Grand Commandant once again before he was removed, probably due to a solar eclipse around the time. His later activities are unknown.[HHS9]

full_text:
Wenren Xi (Dingqing) 聞人襲 (定卿)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wenren Xi (聞人襲), styledDingqing (定卿). Grand Commandant twice during Emperor Ling’s early reign. Wenren Xi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.

BiographySource Undefined
Wenren Xi, styled Dingqing, was from Pei commandery. He first served as Minister Coachman before he was appointed as Grand Commandant. He later resigned, but was made Grand Commandant once again before he was removed, probably due to a solar eclipse around the time. His later activities are unknown.[HHS9]
